mapper.update: UPDATE HOMPI_DAILY_STATS hds JOIN HOMPI hp ON hds.HOMPI_ID = hp.HOMPI_ID SET hds.TODAY_CNT = hds.TODAY_CNT+1, hp.TOTAL_CNT = hp.TOTAL_CNT+1 WHERE hds.HOMPI_ID = #{hompiId} AND hds.DAY_STATS_DATE = #{today}
UPDATE HOMPI SET TOTAL_CNT = TOTAL_CNT + 1 WHERE HOMPI_ID = #{hompiId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wannabe_dev.HOMPI_DAILY_STATS ( HOMPI_ID , DAY_STATS_DATE , TODAY_CNT , REMARKS , INSERT_USER_ID , INSERT_DT , UPDATE_USER_ID , UPDATE_DT) VALUES (#{hompiId}, #{today}, 1, NULL, #{userId}, NOW(), #{userId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT fi.USER_ID , fi.USER_NICKNAME , fi.FRIEND_USER_ID , fi.FRIEND_USER_NICKNAME , hfc.HOMPI_ID , hfc.WRITE_USER_ID , hfc.FRIEND_COMMENTS , hfc.FIXED_YN , ub.NAME , DATE_FORMAT(hfc.INSERT_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS UPDATE_DT FROM HOMPI_FRIEND_COMMENT hfc JOIN FRIEND_INFO fi ON fi.FRIEND_USER_ID = hfc.WRITE_USER_ID JOIN USER_BASIC ub ON hfc.WRITE_USER_ID = ub.USER_ID WHERE hfc.HOMPI_ID = #{hompId} AND hfc.FRIEND_COMMENTS IS NOT NULL AND fi.USER_ID = (SELECT OWNER_USER_ID FROM HOMPI WHERE HOMPI_ID = #{hompId}) ORDER BY hfc.UPDATE_USER_ID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HOMPI_FRIEND_COMMENT ( HOMPI_ID , WRITE_USER_ID , FRIEND_COMMENTS , FIXED_YN , REMARKS , INSERT_USER_ID , INSERT_DT , UPDATE_USER_ID , UPDATE_DT) VALUES ( #{hompiId} , #{userId} , #{fcContent} , 'N' , NULL , #{userId} , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() , NULL , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE FRIEND_COMMENTS = #{fcContent} ,UPDATE_USER_ID = #{userId} ,UPDATE_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ()
mapper.select: SELECT mb.PRODUCT_ID, afm.ATTACH_FILE_ID, afm.FILE_PATH FROM MINIROOM_BASIC mb JOIN PRODUCT p ON p.PRODUCT_ID = mb.PRODUCT_ID JOIN ATTACH_FILE_MANAGE afm ON p.ATTACH_FILE_ID = afm.ATTACH_FILE_ID WHERE USER_ID = (SELECT OWNER_USER_ID FROM HOMPI WHERE HOMPI_ID = #{hompiId})
